## SECTION-e6b909b5-3501-421d-8196-cf84dafa941f @SECTION-019

> ReqIF.ChapterName: Python API

### REQUIREMENT: StrictDoc Python API @SDOC-SRS-125

> STATUS: Active

StrictDoc shall provide a Python API for its core functions: - Reading SDoc files - Creating traceability graph - Generating HTML exports - Converting SDoc to other formats.
